description: Shipping schedule + date/time-specify rules per channel. Combine with the 3-fact pre-reply check (shipped yet? / delivery status? / sale status?).

current_notice.description: Time-bounded shipping notice. Promised shipping date lives here; past valid_until ⇒ escalate. Updated by operator → engineer reflects same day.
current_notice.value: Orders will ship in turn by 2026-06-15.

channels.shipping_estimate: Reference the 'expected delivery' date on each product page (product-specific; do not use the legacy '20–30 days from order' value).
channels.alternative: Use the tracking number in the shipped notification to change delivery time with the courier. For extended absences, contact us in advance to adjust.

channels.shipping_estimate: Reference 'expected delivery' on each product page.
channels.notes: Single-can purchase. Order processing (cancellation, address change) is handled by the operator — auto-escalate.
Only channel with date specification (logistics handles directly). Mis-identifying channel ⇒ wrong guidance.

channels.shipping_estimate: After resigning, first delivery within ~5 days.

rules: All time-bounded shipping info comes from current_notice (no hardcoding in code or skills).
Always identify the channel before replying (mis-identification ⇒ wrong guidance).
For shipping-delay inquiries, verify in the order management system whether the order has shipped before replying.
Address changes after shipping are not possible → direct to courier + provide safety net ('if returned, we will reship').
When the deadline is exceeded, commit with 'we will look into this on priority' (templates_v2 #8).
